name: aboyeur-local
description: DEV marketplace for the sonnette conductor-mesh channel plugin. The real distribution vehicle is spm1001/batterie (aby-zufefu, 2026-07-19); this local Directory install remains for iterating on sonnette without publishing. NB it exercises the same wrapper+bundle path as the shipped plugin — rebuild with `npm run build:sonnette` after src/ edits.

plugins.name: sonnette
plugins.description: Conductor mesh connectivity — peer-to-peer channel between Claude sessions
